metadata.description: RunDrill AnyLearn — a self-contained marketplace hosting the AnyLearn plugin. AnyLearn turns your AI chat into a saved, plan-based course for anything you want to learn: it plans tiny topics for your goal, grounds each in trusted sources, teaches and drills them, and remembers your progress — backed by the RunDrill MCP engine.

plugins.name: rundrill-anylearn
plugins.description: Learn anything inside your AI agent. Tell it what you want to learn; it interviews you (goal, level, deadline, the win that matters), then generates an ordered plan of very small topics scaled to your timeframe and teaches them one at a time — grounding each topic in trusted sources it looks up first, explaining the single idea simply, then drilling with 3-5 short exercises and a check. Your plan, grounding and progress live on the server, so you can stop and resume, run several courses at once, and see a day-by-day trail. For goals that need it, a course can switch on spaced review, mistake re-drilling, Bronze→Silver→Gold evidence tiers, or strict prerequisites. Works for languages, exam cram, certs, coding, chess — anything.
